name: TapResearch

seo.title: TapResearch — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: TapResearch: Mobile survey monetization platform for publishers and advertisers with rewarded survey engagement SDK.

when_to_use: Rewarded survey SDK integration for mobile app publishers
Supplementing ad revenue with survey monetization in apps

pros: Rewarded survey SDK with strong UX
cons: Fill dependent on research demand cycles
review.verdict: Credible rewarded survey option with good UX, but single-format limits upside.
review.best_for: Games and apps adding rewarded surveys to diversify monetization mix.
review.not_for: Publishers wanting primary revenue or non-survey offerwall inventory.
